message:
feat(ui): enhance Label component with variants, indicators, and FormField wrapper

Comprehensive overhaul of the Label component to provide production-ready
form labels with rich functionality and accessibility features.

## Size Variants

Add three size variants via class-variance-authority:
- `sm`: Compact labels for dense forms (text-xs)
- `default`: Standard form labels (text-sm)
- `lg`: Prominent labels for hero forms (text-base)

## Field State Indicators

- Required indicator: Red asterisk (*) with aria-hidden for screen readers
- Optional indicator: Subtle "(optional)" text in muted color
- Error state: Switches label color to destructive theme color
- Disabled state: Reduced opacity (50%) with not-allowed cursor

## New Props

- `required`: Shows red asterisk indicator
- `optional`: Shows "(optional)" text (hidden if required is true)
- `description`: Inline help text below the label
- `error`: Boolean to toggle destructive color state
- `size`: Size variant selector

## New Components

### LabelSimple
Minimal label without wrapper div, for inline/custom layouts.
Same props as Label minus description.

### FormField
Complete form field wrapper that combines:
- Label with all props
- Children slot for input element
- Error message display with icon

FormField provides consistent vertical spacing (gap-2) and proper
error message styling with role="alert" for screen readers.

## Accessibility

- Inline SVG error icon (avoids icon library dependency)
- role="alert" on error messages for screen reader announcement
- aria-hidden on decorative required asterisk
- data-slot attributes for testing and styling hooks
- data-error attribute for CSS state targeting

## Visual Polish

- Transition on color changes (duration-150)
- Relaxed line-height on description text
- Proper gap spacing throughout
- Consistent with design system tokens

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,26 +1,235 @@ "use client" +/** + * Label Component + * + * A polished, accessible form label with world-class UX: + * - Required/optional field indicators + * - Error state styling + * - Inline description/help text support + * - Size variants + * - Disabled state handling + * - Consistent with form design patterns + * + * @module components/ui/label + */ + import * as React from "react" import * as LabelPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-label" import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority" - import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" +// ============================================================================ +// Variants +// ============================================================================ + const labelVariants = cva( - "text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70" + [ + "font-medium leading-none", + "peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-50", + "transition-colors duration-150", + ].join(" "), + { + variants: { + size: { + sm: "text-xs", + default: "text-sm", + lg: "text-base", + }, + error: { + true: "text-destructive", + false: "", + }, + }, + defaultVariants: { + size: "default", + error: false, + }, + } ) +// ============================================================================ +// Types +// ============================================================================ + +interface LabelProps + extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef, + VariantProps { + /** Show required indicator (*) */ + required?: boolean + /** Show optional indicator text */ + optional?: boolean + /** Inline description/help text */ + description?: string + /** Error state - changes color to destructive */ + error?: boolean +} + +// ============================================================================ +// Label Component +// ============================================================================ + const Label = React.forwardRef< React.ElementRef, - React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef & - VariantProps ->(({ className, ...props }, ref) => ( + LabelProps +>(({ className, size, error, required, optional, description, children, ...props }, ref) => ( +
+ + {children} + {required && ( + + * + + )} + {optional && !required && ( + + (optional) + + )} + + {description && ( + + {description} + + )} +
+)) +Label.displayName = LabelPrimitive.Root.displayName + +// ============================================================================ +// Simple Label (no wrapper, for inline use) +// ============================================================================ + +const LabelSimple = React.forwardRef< + React.ElementRef, + Omit +>(({ className, size, error, required, optional, children, ...props }, ref) => ( + > + {children} + {required && ( + + * + + )} + {optional && !required && ( + + (optional) + + )} + )) -Label.displayName = LabelPrimitive.Root.displayName +LabelSimple.displayName = "LabelSimple" + +// ============================================================================ +// Form Field Wrapper (combines label + input + error message) +// ============================================================================ + +interface FormFieldProps extends React.HTMLAttributes { + /** Field label text */ + label: string + /** HTML for attribute to connect label to input */ + htmlFor?: string + /** Show required indicator */ + required?: boolean + /** Show optional indicator */ + optional?: boolean + /** Description/help text */ + description?: string + /** Error message to display */ + error?: string + /** Size variant */ + size?: "sm" | "default" | "lg" +} + +const FormField = React.forwardRef( + ({ className, label, htmlFor, required, optional, description, error, size = "default", children, ...props }, ref) => ( +
+ + {children} + {error && ( + + + {error} + + )} +
+ ) +) +FormField.displayName = "FormField" + +// ============================================================================ +// Exports +// ============================================================================ -export { Label } +export { Label, LabelSimple, FormField, labelVariants }
